scripts.build:all: npm run build -w protocol && npm run build -w sender && npm run build -w receiver
scripts.build:pages: npm run build:all && node scripts/build-pages.mjs && npm run verify:pages
scripts.ci:test: npm run ci:check-focused-tests && NODE_OPTIONS=--unhandled-rejections=strict npm run test -w protocol && NODE_OPTIONS=--unhandled-rejections=strict npm run test -w sender && NODE_OPTIONS=--unhandled-rejections=strict npm run test -w receiver
